project_type: Multi-agent business operating system with FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend, and business artifact layer
build_system: npm scripts for orchestration, pip for backend, pnpm for frontend
test_command: N/A - documentation-only task; validate markdown links and SVG syntax
verification_instructions: 1. Check all files exist in book/user_guide/ structure. 2. Validate all relative SVG links in markdown files resolve correctly. 3. Confirm SVG files are valid XML. 4. Check consistent formatting across all chapters.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - documentation creation task using existing repo content as source material
environment_constraints: Documentation-only task. No network dependencies. All content is generated from existing repo docs (structure.md, docs/*.md, backend.md, frontend.md).
contribution_requirements: Output goes to book/user_guide/ with README.md at root, chapters/ subfolder for markdown, assets/ subfolder for SVGs. File naming: NN-NN-descriptive-name.md for chapters, NN-NN-descriptive-name.svg for assets.
key_patterns: SVG style: viewBox 960xNNN, font-family Segoe UI/Arial/sans-serif, white background, colored boxes with rounded corners (rx=8), arrow markers, text-anchor middle for labels. Color palette: indigo (#6366f1/#e0e7ff), green (#16a34a/#dcfce7), blue (#2563eb/#dbeafe), purple (#a21caf/#fae8ff), red (#dc2626/#fee2e2), yellow (#ca8a04/#fef9c3), slate (#475569/#f1f5f9). Markdown: heading hierarchy, code blocks with syntax highlighting, tables, callout formatting.
directory_structure: book/user_guide/ (to be created): README.md at root, chapters/ for all .md files, assets/ for all .svg files. Source docs in docs/, structure.md at repo root, design_phase SVGs for style reference in book/design_phase/assets/
